cycles.title: Cycle A
cycles.prior_signal: Eight-attempt evidence showed reviewers denied stronger wording because candidate-selection influence was not public-safe and explicit.
cycles.selection_reason: Improve public-safe traceability from prior measurement to next bounded candidate choice.

cycles.title: Cycle B
cycles.prior_signal: Cycle A improved trace quality but exposed that independent readers still need a reproducible step-by-step chain runbook.
cycles.selection_reason: Use Cycle A post-measurement to select a runbook-quality improvement that makes the causal chain independently reviewable.

causal_property: prior measured evidence guided later bounded candidate selection, scope, measurement, and gate outcome
